name: Vance Task Table Lamp W/ USB- 20 Inch Height - TBL4143 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with style and functionality with the Vance 20 inch black iron table lamp. Designed to complement any decor, this sleek black lamp enhances modern and classic settings alike. Standing at a convenient 20 inches, it is the perfect size for your desk, bedside, or living room table. The robust iron construction provides durability and stability, ideal for everyday use. 

Adding to its practicality, the integrated USB port allows for hassle-free charging of your devices, making it a modern essential for any workspace or bedroom. The Vance table lamp combines a clean silhouette with a touch of elegance, making it a versatile addition to your home. Light up your world effortlessly with the functionality and style of this well-crafted lamp.
